title: Override Firefox memory limits to export Facebook e2e chats
content:
I decided to try exporting my Facebook Messenger E2E encrypted chats, however I keep running into a variety of problems, because the process is simply badly written. By default, the process breaks when the website local storage data reaches 10GB - that is, as far as I understand, a Firefox limit. There is still plenty of RAM and disk space remaining. When the local storage hits 10GB, you get a "Quota exceeded" DOM Exception.

To get around that, I've changed browser.cache.disk.smart_size.enabled -> False browser.cache.disk.capacity -> 50GB (values in KB of course) dom.storage.default_quota -> 25GB dom.storage.default_site_quota -> 25GB browser.cache.disk.max_entry_size -> 256MB (seemed like some larger files were missing, like longer videos)

However the process still breaks, although I'm unsure if it wasn't a soft-limit by Facebook the last time (since it stopped downloading around 8,5-9GB, earlier than in previous attempts)

Are there more settings that could be limiting the export apart from those mentioned? I understand this is pushing the browser over the reasonable limits, however I still hope it is possible to override them for that one-off situation before reverting to defaults.
creator: guardianin

title: Computer Shutdown Re-Set Profile Entirely
content: I hard shut down my laptop and when I re-opened it, Firefox seemed to have reset itself completely. My profiles were gone, my bookmarks are still present but their icons are missing, my background is missing, my extensions un-pinned, and -- naturally -- all of my tabs were closed. My original profile is completely gone, which kind of sucks, because it was pretty personalized. I think even my preference settings reversed themselves, because it tried to show me the AI chatbot on the sidebar, which I had turned off. I figured at first that it was a matter of spotty connection, because I was using my phone's hotspot at the time, but I'm now back with a solid wi-fi connection, and everything is still acting strangely. Help? How do I get my original profile back in its proper form, if possible? Or, at least, the icons to show back up on my bookmarks? I have turned everything off and back on again, as it were.

title: Necesito desarrollar una propuesta que convence al 100% a los hoteleros en Bocas del Tora a acceder a realizar regularmente una certificación de agua potable para sus clientes como una inversión que genera venta y no un gasto.
content: Mi empresa, Tropic Clear Water, desde hace 3 años certifica cada 3 meses (inversión del hotel $US 1000 cada 3 meses) la calidad de agua del hotel Nayara Bocas del Toro, lo cual les ha ayudado ofrecer a sus mayoristas un gran argumento de ventas. El hotel prácticamente se mantiene con una ocupación mayor al 90 %. Como servicio adicional y de forma gratuita asesoramos la parte operativa de hotel en profesionalizar su mantenimiento del sistema de purificación de agua y la limpieza en su red de distribución. Reclamos de clientes que fueron afectados por diarrea durante su estancia e iniciaron reclamos después de haber regresado a USA han sido exitosamente neutralizados por parte del hotel, ya que contaron con un historial impecable de control de calidad de agua potable. Lo que necesito es desarrollar una campaña para captar nuevos clientes permanentes. Podemos ofrecer por ejemplo descuentos por contrato por año (mínimo 2 análisis/certificaciones) o cualquier propuesta funcional está bienvenida. Estoy organizando una visita por 4 días, del 9 al 13 de Abril a Bocas del Toro para poder visitar a los interesados muy pronto. También podemos ofrecer un descuento para el primer análisis para cada cliente a ver en que condición está la calidad del agua que ofrecen a susclientes. Nuestra página web es tropicclearwater.com, también favor sugerir como acutalizarla.
